summary: Comprehensive testing of new Tech Risk Assessment and Issue Management modules. All backend API tests pass (39/39). All frontend E2E tests pass (22/22). ServiceNow integration is in MOCK mode. CMDB context returns mock data.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for assessments and issues during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Tech Risk Assessment supports intelligent questionnaire, risk identification, PDF report generation, and issue creation from risks. Issue Management supports full lifecycle (create, update, resolve, close), comments, history tracking, and ServiceNow sync (MOCKED). Backend tests in test_tech_risk_assessment.py and test_issue_management.py. Frontend tests in tech-risk-assessment.spec.ts and issue-management.spec.ts.

tech_risk_assessment.create_assessment: PASS - Create with context, CMDB integration (mock)
tech_risk_assessment.submit_questionnaire: PASS - Risk identification and control recommendations
tech_risk_assessment.create_issues: PASS - Create issues from identified risks
tech_risk_assessment.filter_assessments: PASS - Filter by status and app name
tech_risk_assessment.risk_categories: PASS - Get risk categories and ratings

issue_management.list_issues: PASS - List with filters (status, priority, type)
issue_management.resolve_issue: PASS - Resolution with root cause and lessons learned
